_note: 拟真种子数据集——仅用于跑通 harness + 演示方法学,非真实日志,得分不构成差异化证据。真跑请复制本 schema 为 cases.json 并填入作者 ~20 条真实失败日志(刻意纳入 diff-decisive 案)。难度: diff-decisive=根因只在 diff 不在日志 / log-evident=日志自明(A 也应答对,做控制)/ kb-decisive=需过往案例知识。

cases.failureLog:
> shop@1.4.0 build
> vite build
npm error code ERESOLVE
npm error ERESOLVE could not resolve
npm error While resolving: @tanstack/react-router@1.20.0
npm error Found: react@18.3.1
npm error Could not resolve dependency:
npm error peer react@">=19.0.0" from @tanstack/react-router@1.40.0
npm error Conflicting peer dependency: react@19.0.0
npm error Fix the upstream dependency conflict, or retry
npm error this command with --force or --legacy-peer-deps
npm error A complete log of this run can be found in: /root/.npm/_logs/2026-05-29T10_22_05_991Z-debug-0.log
Error: build failed with exit code 1
cases.diffSummary:
自上次成功运行 #208 以来 package.json 变更:
  + "@tanstack/react-router": "^1.40.0"   (上次为 ^1.20.0)
  package-lock.json: 14 个间接依赖随之变化;react 仍固定 18.3.1

groundTruth.rootCause: @tanstack/react-router 从 1.20 升到 1.40,新版要求 react>=19 的 peer 依赖,但项目仍锁在 react 18.3.1,产生 ERESOLVE 冲突。
groundTruth.correctFix: 把 @tanstack/react-router 回退到与 react 18 兼容的版本(如 ^1.20.0),或同步升级 react 到 19;不要用 --force/--legacy-peer-deps 掩盖。

cases.failureLog:
go build ./...
# github.com/acme/billing/internal/invoice
internal/invoice/calc.go:88:14: undefined: money.RoundHalfEven
internal/invoice/calc.go:142:9: undefined: money.RoundHalfEven
note: module requires Go 1.23
Error: build failed with exit code 2
cases.diffSummary: 自上次成功运行 #51 以来:internal/money 包重命名了导出函数;go.mod 无变化。

groundTruth.rootCause: calc.go 调用了 money.RoundHalfEven,但该导出符号已不存在(被重命名/删除),编译期 undefined。
groundTruth.correctFix: 在 money 包确认正确的舍入函数名并改调用点,或恢复 RoundHalfEven 导出;日志已直接点名符号与文件行。

cases.failureLog:
[boot] starting shop-api v1.4.0
[boot] connecting to database...
Error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:5432
    at TCPConnectWrap.afterConnect [as oncomplete] (node:net:1607:16)
[health] /healthz returned 503 after 3 attempts
Error: deploy health check failed
cases.diffSummary:
自上次成功部署 #126 以来环境变量变更:
  - DB_HOST   (本次配置中被移除;#126 时为 db-prod.internal)
    DB_PORT=5432  DB_USER=shop  DB_PASSWORD=[MASKED]  (未变)

groundTruth.rootCause: 本次部署的环境配置漏了 DB_HOST,应用回退到默认 127.0.0.1 连库,生产无本地库故 ECONNREFUSED。
groundTruth.correctFix: 在该环境凭据/变量中补回 DB_HOST=db-prod.internal(参照 #126),重新部署。根因在 diff 的 env 移除,不在日志。

cases.failureLog:
[INFO] BUILD FAILURE
[ERROR] /src/main/java/com/acme/web/AuthFilter.java:[7,26] package javax.servlet does not exist
[ERROR] /src/main/java/com/acme/web/AuthFilter.java:[19,33] cannot find symbol: class HttpServletRequest
[ERROR] -> [Help 1] To see the full stack trace re-run with -e
Error: build failed with exit code 1
cases.diffSummary: 自上次成功运行 #33 以来:pom.xml 升级了 spring-boot-starter-parent 2.7→3.2(Jakarta 命名空间迁移)。

groundTruth.rootCause: Spring Boot 3 迁移到 jakarta.* 命名空间,javax.servlet 不再可用;代码仍 import javax.servlet。
groundTruth.correctFix: 把 javax.servlet.* 改为 jakarta.servlet.*(配合 SB3 迁移),或加回 javax 兼容依赖。日志点名了缺失包,但'为何缺'要结合 diff 的 SB 大版本升级。

cases.failureLog:
Collecting numpy
Collecting pandas==2.2.1
ERROR: Cannot install pandas==2.2.1 and numpy==1.24.0 because these package versions have conflicting dependencies.
The conflict is caused by:
    The user requested numpy==1.24.0
    pandas 2.2.1 depends on numpy>=1.26.0; python_version >= "3.12"
ERROR: ResolutionImpossible
Error: build failed with exit code 1
cases.diffSummary:
自上次成功运行 #77 以来 requirements.txt:
  pandas 2.1.4 -> 2.2.1   (numpy 仍固定 ==1.24.0)

groundTruth.rootCause: pandas 升到 2.2.1 要求 numpy>=1.26,但 requirements 把 numpy 钉死 1.24.0,解析冲突。
groundTruth.correctFix: 放开/升级 numpy 到 >=1.26(或回退 pandas 到 2.1.4)。日志已说明冲突,diff 指明是 pandas 的 bump 引入。

kbCases.symptom: 拉取 base 镜像 429 / 看似网络超时
kbCases.rootCause: Docker Hub 匿名拉取速率限制(每 IP/6h),并非网络故障
kbCases.fix: 配置 registry 镜像加速或带认证拉取;case #114 已并入知识库

groundTruth.rootCause: Docker Hub 对匿名拉取的速率限制(429 Too Many Requests),并非真实网络/配置错误;无代码变更佐证是环境侧限流。
groundTruth.correctFix: 改用带认证的拉取或配置 registry 镜像/私有缓存;不要当成偶发网络重试。此根因易被误判为'超时',知识库 #114 正是此类。
